name: Chicken Diane
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions until just al dente.
2. Immediately drain and rinse with hot water to wash off starch, then with cold water to stop the cooking process; drain again. To prevent pasta from sticking together, rub a small amount of butter in your hand and pass it through the strands of pasta.
3. In a medium bowl, mash 4 tablespoons of butter and combine with Cajun Magic Poultry and chicken seasoning.
4. Heat a large skillet over high heat until hot, about 4 minutes.
5. Add chicken pieces to the skillet and brown for about 2 minutes on one side, then about 1 minute on the other.
6. Add mushrooms, green onions, parsley, garlic, and stock to the skillet. Cook for 2 minutes or until the sauce is boiling rapidly.
7. Add the remaining butter (cut into pats), stirring and shaking the pan to incorporate.
8. Cook for 3 minutes, then add the cooked pasta. Stir and shake the pan to mix well.
9. Serve immediately.
